plugins.name: db-guard
plugins.description: Intercepts destructive database and infrastructure commands — drizzle, prisma, terraform, raw SQL. Blocks before execution.
plugins.author: community

plugins.name: token-guard
plugins.description: Proactive token burn prevention. Monitors context fill and intercepts expensive operations before your session limit runs out.
plugins.author: community

plugins.name: scope-guard
plugins.description: Hook-enforced task scope boundaries. Blocks writes outside the defined task perimeter — enforcement, not suggestions.
plugins.author: community

plugins.name: api-guard
plugins.description: Catches broken API contracts the moment a signature changes. Finds all callers before the file is even saved.
plugins.author: community

plugins.name: context-doctor
plugins.description: Diagnoses and fixes bloated CLAUDE.md and skill files. Stops context rot from burning tokens on every single message.
plugins.author: community

plugins.name: monorepo-setup
plugins.description: Scans nx/turbo/pnpm workspace config and auto-generates nested CLAUDE.md files for every package.
plugins.author: community
